name: Ebos Group Limited
analysis: EBO's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 54% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (2.0× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$16.9100, stop A$15.5232, target A$19.2000 (1.65:1) — then trail it.
